name: Frag Grenade
description: A throwable explosive that deals damage to operators and destroys soft surfaces.

name: Stun Grenade
description: A flashbang that temporarily blinds and disorients operators in its area of effect.

name: Breach Charge
description: An explosive charge that destroys soft walls, floors, and ceilings.

name: Claymore
description: A proximity-triggered directional mine that detonates when enemies cross its laser.

name: Proximity Alarm
description: An alarm that triggers when enemies move through its detection range.

name: Impact Grenade
description: A grenade that detonates on impact with a surface, creating a hole in soft walls.

name: Barbed Wire
description: Slows down enemies who walk through it and makes noise to alert defenders.

name: Bulletproof Camera
description: A hardened camera that can be placed on walls to provide intel on attackers.

name: Hard Breach Charge
description: A charge that destroys reinforced walls and floors when planted.

name: Nitro Cell
description: A remote-detonated explosive device that deals heavy damage in its blast radius.

name: Smoke Grenade
description: Creates a cloud of smoke that obscures vision in the area.

name: Adrenal Surge
description: Finka's unique gadget. Activates a nanite injection that heals and boosts all teammates simultaneously.

name: Automated Defense System
description: Jäger's unique gadget. A gyroscopic mounted system that automatically destroys incoming grenades.

name: AirJab Repulsion Mine
description: Nomad's unique gadget. A proximity mine that pushes back and alerts when enemies cross its trigger zone.

name: Argus Launcher
description: Zero's unique gadget. A launcher that fires camera bolts which embed into surfaces and gadgets to provide intel.

name: Armor Pack
description: Castle's unique gadget. Bulletproof barricades that reinforce doorways and windows against enemy breaching.

name: Banshee Sonic Defense
description: Melusi's unique gadget. A proximity device that emits a sonic pulse to slow and debuff nearby attackers.

name: Bear Trap
description: Frost's unique gadget. A concealed trap that instantly downs any attacker who steps on it.

name: BFU Ram
description: Ram's unique gadget. A remote-controlled battering ram drone that destroys reinforced walls and defender gadgets.

name: Black Eye
description: Valkyrie's unique gadget. Small, concealable cameras that can be placed anywhere to provide intel to the team.

name: Black Mirror
description: Mira's unique gadget. A one-way mirror device embedded in walls that allows defenders to see through without attackers seeing in.

name: Breaching Torch
description: Maverick's unique gadget. A torch that quietly cuts through reinforced walls and metal surfaces.

name: Candela
description: Ying's unique gadget. A proximity-triggered cluster of flashbangs that disorients multiple enemies at once.

name: Cardboard Box
description: Solid Snake's unique gadget. A cardboard box that conceals the operator while stationary.

name: CCE Shield
description: Clash's unique gadget. An electrified riot shield that can stun attackers and track their movements.

name: CED-1 Shock Wire
description: Bandit's unique gadget. An electrical device that charges reinforced walls and barbed wire to destroy breaching equipment.

name: Cluster Charge
description: Fuze's unique gadget. A breaching device that fires multiple grenades through walls into the room beyond.

name: Death Mark
description: Deimos's unique gadget. Marks a targeted enemy, revealing their position to the team until eliminated.

name: EDD Mk II Tripwire
description: Kapkan's unique gadget. A hidden explosive tripwire device that detonates when enemies cross its laser.

name: Electronics Detector
description: IQ's unique gadget. A scanner that detects all active electronic devices through walls.

name: EMP Grenade
description: Thatcher's unique gadget. A grenade that disables and destroys electronic gadgets through walls.

name: EMS5 Scan
description: Lion's unique gadget. An EMP pulse that scans for moving enemies through any surface and reveals their location.

name: ERC-7
description: Vigil's unique gadget. A device that removes Vigil from enemy drone feeds for a limited duration.

name: Evil Eye
description: Maestro's unique gadget. A bulletproof camera turret embedded in walls that can fire laser blasts at enemies.

name: Exothermic Charge
description: Thermite's unique gadget. A charge that destroys reinforced walls and floors from the attacking side.

name: Extendable Shield
description: Montagne's unique gadget. An extendable riot shield that provides full-body protection when extended.

name: Eyenox Model III
description: Jackal's unique gadget. A visor scanner that analyzes enemy footprints to track their current location.

name: F-NATT Dread Mine
description: Fenrir's unique gadget. Remotely triggered proximity mines that emit a fear-inducing sphere blinding enemies.

name: Flash Shield
description: Blitz's unique gadget. A riot shield with an integrated flash device that blinds nearby enemies.

name: Flip Sight
description: Glaz's unique gadget. A special scope with a thermal lens that highlights enemies through smoke.

name: Gadget Pouch
description: Recruit's unique gadget. A pouch containing extra gadgets for increased utility.

name: Garra Hook
description: Amaru's unique gadget. A grappling hook that allows rapid entry through windows and hatches.

name: Gemini Replicator
description: Iana's unique gadget. Creates a holographic decoy of Iana that can be controlled remotely.

name: Glance Smart Glasses
description: Warden's unique gadget. Smart glasses that counter flashbangs, smoke, and make enemies visible in smoke.

name: Grzmot Mine
description: Ela's unique gadget. A concussion mine that disorients and slows enemies caught in its blast.

name: Gu Mines
description: Lesion's unique gadget. Invisible needle mines that inject a toxin causing damage over time.

name: Gun Shield
description: Blackbeard's unique gadget. A rifle shield mounted on primary weapons that protects the operator's head.

name: Heartbeat Sensor
description: Pulse's unique gadget. A sensor that detects nearby enemy heartbeats through walls and floors.

name: HEL Presence Reduction
description: Nøkk's unique gadget. A glove device that makes Nøkk invisible to cameras and makes movement quieter.

name: Kawan Hive Launcher
description: Grim's unique gadget. A launcher that fires hive canisters releasing tracking nanobots on contact.

name: Kiba Barrier
description: Azami's unique gadget. A kunai that deploys an indestructible barrier on impact with a surface.

name: Kludge Drone
description: Brava's unique gadget. A hacking drone that takes control of enemy gadgets and turns them against defenders.

name: Kona Station
description: Thunderbird's unique gadget. A healing station that automatically restores health to nearby operators.

name: KSL12 Launcher
description: Zofia's unique gadget. A launcher that fires concussion and impact grenades in rapid succession.

name: Logic Bomb
description: Dokkaebi's unique gadget. Hacks enemy phones to emit sound and disable their cameras temporarily.

name: LV Lance
description: Kali's unique gadget. An underbarrel launcher that fires explosive bolts through floors to destroy defender gadgets.

name: Mag-NET System
description: Wamai's unique gadget. A deployable magnet disc that attracts and detonates incoming grenades.

name: Mining Drill
description: Denari's unique gadget. A remote-controlled drill that bores through reinforced walls.

name: Parawing Kit
description: Rauora's unique gadget. A deployable gliding kit that allows fast horizontal movement and bypasses traps.

name: P.E.S.T.
description: Mozzie's unique gadget. A small drone that captures and repurposes enemy drones for defender intel.

name: Prisma
description: Alibi's unique gadget. Creates holographic decoys of Alibi that reveal attackers who shoot them.

name: Prisma Drone
description: Doki's unique gadget. A drone that projects a holographic decoy to confuse attackers.

name: Raven Drone
description: Skopos's unique gadget. A surveillance drone that provides persistent aerial intel on enemy positions.

name: Razorbloom
description: Thorn's unique gadget. A proximity-triggered explosive device with a delayed detonation after arming.

name: RCE-Ratero Charge
description: Flores's unique gadget. A remote-controlled exploding drone used to destroy gadgets from afar.

name: Remah Dash
description: Oryx's unique gadget. An ability that allows Oryx to charge through soft walls and vault over downed enemies.

name: Remote Gas Canister
description: Smoke's unique gadget. A remote-detonated canister that releases a toxic cloud damaging nearby enemies.

name: R.O.U. Projector System
description: Sens's unique gadget. Deploys a rolling projector that creates a wall of light obscuring line-of-sight.

name: Rtila Electroclaw
description: Kaid's unique gadget. An electrified claw device that charges reinforced walls and barbed wire.

name: S.E.L.M.A.
description: Ace's unique gadget. A throwable device that opens multiple breaches in reinforced walls and floors.

name: Shock Drone
description: Twitch's unique gadget. A remote-controlled drone with an electric prod that destroys defender gadgets.

name: Shumikha Launcher
description: Tachanka's unique gadget. A grenade launcher that fires incendiary rounds creating burning areas.

name: Signal Disruptor
description: Mute's unique gadget. A jammer device that disables drones, remote gadgets, and breaching equipment.

name: Silent Step
description: Caveira's unique gadget. An ability that allows Caveira to move in near-silence while crouching.

name: Skeleton Key
description: Buck's unique gadget. An underbarrel shotgun that destroys soft surfaces for fast breaching.

name: SPEC-IO Electro-Sensor
description: Solis's unique gadget. A sensor visor that detects and identifies all electronic gadgets through walls.

name: Surya Gate
description: Aruni's unique gadget. A laser gate placed in doorways that damages and blocks enemies passing through.

name: Tactical Crossbow
description: Capitão's unique gadget. A crossbow that fires smoke and asphyxiation bolts to flush out defenders.

name: Talon-8 Shield
description: Osa's unique gadget. A transparent deployable shield that can be placed on windows and floors.

name: Trax Stingers
description: Gridlock's unique gadget. Deploys a trail of spiky devices that slow and damage enemies walking over them.

name: Volcan Canister
description: Goyo's unique gadget. A deployable canister that explodes with fire when shot, destroying nearby gadgets.

name: X-KAIROS
description: Hibana's unique gadget. A launcher that fires remote-detonated pellets that destroy reinforced surfaces.

name: Yokai
description: Echo's unique gadget. An aerial drone that can stun and disorient enemies while remaining hidden above.

name: Zoto Canister
description: Tubarão's unique gadget. A canister that freezes defender gadgets, temporarily disabling them.

name: Breaching Hammer
description: Sledge's unique gadget. A large hammer that silently destroys soft walls without explosives.

name: Breaching Round
description: Ash's unique gadget. A remote-detonated grenade launcher round that destroys barricades and defender gadgets from range.

name: Stim Pistol
description: Doc's unique gadget. A syringe pistol that can heal or overheal the user and teammates.

name: Armor Pack
description: Rook's unique gadget. A bag of armor packs that all operators can pick up to increase their armor rating.
